OVERPAYMENT ON FIRST PAPER FILING, TR #27816 FILED BY DEFENDANT BRANDFORCE, INC

LAW AND MOTION 301, NO APPEARANCES ON THIS MATTER. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: DEFENDANT BRANDFORCE, INCORPORATED'S MOTION TO SET ASIDE DEFAULT/DEFAULT JUDGMENT IS GRANTED PER STIPULATION OF PARTIES. DEFENDANT IS PERMITTED TO FILE THE PROPOSED ANSWER NO LATER THAN MARCH 11, 2011. MOVING PARTY IS TO SUBMIT A PROPOSED FORM OF ORDER. JUDGE: PETER J. BUSCH, REPORTER: CAROL KAREN, CSR # 8189 (301/PJB)
